subject: P0: All API calls returning 503 — production down
body:
We are seeing 100% failure rate on /v1/* endpoints from our infrastructure since 07:48 UTC. Initial trace below:

```
HTTP 503 Service Unavailable
x-request-id: c4f8e2a-2026-...
upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers. reset reason: connection failure
```

Latency on our side is normal; resolves to your edge IP. Suspect upstream issue. Our customer-facing dashboard is fully degraded.

Need someone on this immediately. Status page shows green which is wrong.

Aarav Mehta
Senior SRE

subject: CRITICAL: webhook deliveries dropped at 13:50 UTC
body:
Webhook delivery rate from your platform dropped to ~3% at 13:50 UTC. Our event-driven downstream systems are not receiving updates. We have $2.4M of payment events queued behind this.

Not a config change on our side. Confirmed receiving 200s on our endpoint when manually testing. Your retry queue must be wedged.

This is impacting revenue right now. Please respond.

Priya, Engineering Lead

subject: URGENT — security concern, possible account compromise
body:
I'm seeing API calls from IPs we don't own — 4 different ASNs in the last 2 hours, none of which are ours. Authenticated as our service account.

Our AWS CloudTrail confirms we did NOT issue these calls. Either our API key has leaked or there's something off with your auth layer.

I've rotated the key. But we need to understand the blast radius. Can your security team pull the full audit log for our account from 18:00 UTC yesterday to now?

Chen Wei
CTO

subject: DOWN during customer demo in 12 minutes
body:
I have a $400K customer demo starting at 01:30 UTC. Right now I cannot log into our workspace. Says 'session expired' on every browser, every device. Cleared cookies. No dice.

If I can't fix this in 12 minutes the demo is dead.

Please — anyone — respond.

Sofia

subject: Production data discrepancy detected
body:
We have a data integrity issue. The ticket count in your /v2/reports/overview API is off from the actual ticket count in our database by ~18%. Reproduced consistently across 5 different windows.

This affects our customer-facing metrics page. Customers are about to start asking why our numbers don't match theirs.

Need engineering on this. Not a question of UI — the API is wrong.

Kwame Mensah
Head of Engineering

subject: URGENT: Production outage affecting critical workflows
body:
Multiple services are failing. Our team cannot complete core workflows. Specifically:

- Inbox is not loading (spinner)
- API returns 500 on /tickets and /tickets/{id}
- Email-in is silently dropping (we can see customer emails not arriving)

Started ~08:30 UTC. Status page still green. Please escalate to on-call.

Elena Petrova
VP Engineering

subject: Tickets disappearing from inbox in real time
body:
I'm watching my inbox right now and tickets are disappearing. They were there 5 minutes ago. They're gone now. I can see in our audit log that they're being archived by 'system' — no user attribution.

This is across multiple users on my team. Not isolated.

Is there a runaway automation? Did something deploy that's auto-archiving? STOP IT. We need this data.

Diego

subject: Compliance audit at 12:00 UTC — need access fixed NOW
body:
We have a SOC 2 audit in 4 hours. The auditor needs to see our access logs and ticket history for Q1. Our admin account is currently locked out — 'too many failed attempts' even though I'm the only one with credentials.

If I can't get in within 2 hours we fail the audit. Failing the audit costs us a $1.2M enterprise contract that closes Friday.

Unlock the account. I will verify identity any way you need.

Ananya Rao
Head of Compliance

subject: SSO completely broken since deploy
body:
Since your deploy at 22:00 UTC, SSO via Okta is completely broken for our org. 247 users affected. Login redirects to a 404.

We disabled SSO temporarily and fell back to password auth as workaround, but most users don't have passwords set.

Urgently need this rolled back or fixed forward.

Jean Dupont
Director of IT

subject: Database lock — entire workspace frozen
body:
Our workspace appears completely frozen. All write operations return:

```
{"error": "workspace_locked", "retry_after": 60}
```

But it's been 45 minutes. Reads still work. Writes still fail.

We have an end-of-day book close happening. Stuck.

Li Na, CTO

subject: Sev1: rate limits cratered after upgrade
body:
We upgraded to Enterprise tier yesterday. Per the plan we should get 10K req/min.

Instead, since 12:00 UTC we've been throttled at ~500 req/min — actually lower than our previous tier. Every burst returns 429. Our integration is dead in the water.

The rate limit config on your side must not have updated post-upgrade. Please fix manually.

Mateo Herrera
Staff Engineer

subject: URGENT — customer data leakage detected
body:
I just received a notification email from your system that contained another customer's data. Their ticket subject, body, and email address. Not mine.

This is a serious P0 privacy incident. I have a screenshot. I'm not sharing it publicly because that would compound the leak, but you need to know — your notification routing is broken.

I want a written incident response and confirmation that my data hasn't been sent to anyone else.

Amina Bello
General Counsel

subject: P1 — bulk export hung 4h, jobs queued behind
body:
Bulk export job exp_8a31b2 has been processing for 4 hours and 12 minutes. Stuck at 47%. All subsequent jobs from our org are queued behind it.

We have a weekly reporting deadline that hits at 00:00 UTC. We need this unstuck or killed so we can re-queue.

Logs from your side?

Oliver Fischer

subject: Customer was just billed twice in 30 seconds
body:
Critical issue — our payment provider just executed two charges 30 seconds apart for the same customer. Both successful. They emailed me upset.

Webhook from your system fired twice with identical payloads. event_id is same. Some kind of retry logic gone wrong on your side?

I need this fixed before more customers are double-charged. Pause the webhook stream for our account if you have to.

Riya Kapoor
VP Engineering

subject: Inbox shows yesterday's data — stale cache?
body:
Every user on my team is seeing the inbox state from ~14 hours ago. Refreshing doesn't update. New emails aren't appearing in the UI. The data IS coming in (we can see it in the API) — it's just not showing in the UI.

Something is serving stale cached data. Please flush our org's cache or whatever needs to happen.

Tomas

subject: Outage during product launch — RESPOND NOW
body:
WE ARE LAUNCHING IN 90 MINUTES AND YOUR PRODUCT IS DOWN. We were supposed to live-demo the AI Copilot feature on our launch keynote. It doesn't work.

I've contacted your team via 3 channels in the past hour. Zero response.

If we can't demo on time, that's $300K of product launch marketing burned and I'm escalating to your CEO publicly.

Mei Zhang, CEO

subject: P0: data deletion — need restore from backup
body:
I need a restore. Today at 20:00 UTC, ~5,400 tickets were deleted from our workspace. We've audited and confirmed: no user on our side triggered this. The audit log shows 'deleted_by: api_token_xxx' but that token hasn't been used by us today.

Either someone else has our token, OR your platform deleted data autonomously. Either way it's catastrophic.

Need: full restore + incident report. Status: P0.

Carlos Mendes
Head of Customer Success

subject: Heimdall integration totally broken since 03:00
body:
Our Heimdall pipeline broke at 03:00 UTC and we just noticed at standup. Every event from your platform → our system is failing schema validation.

Looks like you changed the webhook payload shape without notice. New required field `event_metadata.dispatch_id` was not there yesterday.

Was this announced? Couldn't find it in changelog. Please confirm and provide a transition window. Production-critical.

Nandini Iyer
Platform Engineer

subject: DDoS or runaway client? Our usage just exploded
body:
Our API usage just jumped from baseline 200 req/sec to 14,000 req/sec in 4 minutes. Our auth logs show every request authenticating as our service account.

We are not the source. Suspect either credential leak (key in a public repo somewhere — investigating) or DDoS through our auth path.

Can you rate-limit our token to baseline + 10% until we contain this on our side? Will rotate the key in next 15 minutes.

Pablo Gutierrez
Security Engineer

subject: P0 — Customer-facing chat widget completely broken
body:
Our embedded chat widget is broken on all customer sites. Console shows:

```
Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read property 'apiKey' of undefined
    at chat-widget.min.js:12:8421
    at HTMLDocument.<anonymous> (chat-widget.min.js:14:202)
```

Deployed your widget JS at v3.4.1, was working yesterday. Did you push v3.4.2 without warning?

Our customers cannot chat with our support team right now. THIS IS BLOCKING REVENUE.

Anna Kowalska, Engineering Lead

subject: API auth completely broken — 401 on every request
body:
Every API call from us to your platform has been returning 401 since 06:00 UTC. Same API key that worked yesterday. We have NOT rotated.

We verified: header is `Authorization: Bearer xxx`, key matches what's in your dashboard, account is active.

Is there a JWT issuer issue? Some kind of cert expiry?

This is breaking our overnight batch jobs. Please look.

Rahul Verma
Lead Engineer

subject: Critical: tickets routing to wrong inboxes
body:
We are seeing tickets that should route to our Billing inbox going to our Technical Support inbox. ~30% misroute rate.

Our tagging rules haven't changed. The misrouted tickets all have correct tags applied. Something on your routing layer is wrong.

This is messing up our team's queue. Customers complaining about delayed responses on billing issues. Please look.

Eva Muller

subject: All emails bouncing — outgoing replies failing
body:
Since 09:15 UTC, every outgoing reply from our team is bouncing back with:

```
Delivery to the following recipient failed permanently:
Reason: 550-5.7.1 Email rejected per DMARC policy
```

Our DKIM/SPF records haven't changed. Either your outbound mail config changed or your relay IP got onto a blocklist.

We have ~800 customer replies queued that haven't gone out. Please fix urgently.

Samuel Okafor

subject: P0: Dashboard showing $0 revenue
body:
Our revenue dashboard is showing $0 across all customers since 17:00 UTC. We know this is wrong — backend confirms we are processing transactions normally.

This is feeding our investor metrics dashboard. We can't have $0 revenue showing.

Is this a data pipeline issue on your end?

Isabella Rossi
VP Finance

subject: Production fire — please escalate
body:
I've been waiting 6 hours for a response on ticket #20104 which I marked P0 yesterday. The issue (analytics pipeline emitting bad data) is still ongoing and is now affecting our customer-facing reports.

I'm beyond frustrated at this point but more critically — we need engineering on this. Six hours on a P0 with zero response is an SLA violation.

Who do I need to escalate to to actually get someone to look?

Arjun Singh
Director of Engineering

subject: Severe perf degradation — P95 from 800ms to 14s
body:
Our P95 latency on /v1/conversations has gone from 800ms to 14,000ms over the last 90 minutes. Distribution is bimodal — 70% are fast, 30% time out at our 30s limit.

Our side is fine. Same query pattern, same data volume. Something is unhealthy on your end.

Lucia Fernandez
Senior SRE

subject: URGENT — financial year close on hold
body:
We are in our financial year-end close right now. Our finance team needs to export 12 months of billing data and your export API has been failing for the past 4 hours.

This is blocking our annual close. CFO is escalating internally. We have a board meeting tomorrow where these numbers matter.

Please look at job ids: exp_9f2a01, exp_9f2a02, exp_9f2a03. All stuck.

Wei Huang, Finance Operations

subject: Sev1: backend returning corrupted JSON
body:
Started receiving malformed JSON responses from /v2/tickets/* endpoints at ~08:00 UTC. Example:

```
{"id":12345,"subject":"foo""body":"bar"}  // missing comma between fields
```

Parser breaks. Reproduced from multiple clients. ~12% of responses affected, seemingly random.

Looks like a serialization bug post-deploy. Please rollback or hotfix.

Fatima Yusuf
Backend Lead

subject: Cannot reach status page or main site — full outage?
body:
Both your status page AND your main app are returning 502 Bad Gateway from our network. Confirmed from 3 different ISPs and a mobile hotspot.

If this is a full platform outage, customers will be raging. Please confirm and update us when it's resolved.

Marek Zielinski, On-call Engineer

subject: SAML cert expired — entire enterprise locked out
body:
Your SAML signing certificate expired today at 18:00 UTC. None of our SSO logins work. 89 users locked out, including all admins.

We have no backup local auth on this account because it's SAML-only per our security policy.

Please either renew the cert or temporarily provide an alternate auth path. We can't even file this ticket through the dashboard because we can't log in.

Neha Bhatia
Identity Team Lead

subject: P0 — payments webhook firing for refunded transactions
body:
Your billing webhook is sending `transaction.succeeded` events for transactions that were ALREADY refunded. We're processing them as new revenue. Booking errors compounding by the hour.

Need to know:
1. Pause the webhook stream until fixed.
2. Send us a list of affected transactions so we can reconcile.

This is corrupting our accounting.

Miguel Torres
Finance Engineering

subject: Suspicious login activity — possible account takeover
body:
Hi security team,

We just received an alert: 14 successful logins to our admin account from IPs in 3 different countries within 20 minutes. None of those are us.

I'm locking the account from our side. Need you to:
1. Confirm whether your auth logs match what we see.
2. Force-rotate all sessions for our org.
3. Send IRR (incident response report).

This might be a credential stuffing attack against your platform.

Chinwe Eze, CISO

subject: Webhook deliveries delayed 15+ minutes
body:
Bonjour,

Our webhook delivery latency has gone from p99 ~2s to p99 ~14 minutes. This effectively breaks our event-driven workflows downstream — by the time we get the event, the customer has already moved on.

Started around 07:00 UTC. Anything ongoing on your queue infrastructure?

Pierre Laurent
Principal Engineer

subject: Critical: API returning records belonging to different org
body:
I'm hitting our /v1/tickets endpoint and getting back tickets that belong to a different customer. NOT OURS. Different domain, different sender names.

This is a data leak. I'm not going to share the data here for obvious reasons but I have logs proving this.

Need immediate response. This is a P0 multi-tenant boundary violation.

Kavya Sharma
Staff Engineer

subject: P0 — multiple services failing, status page wrong
body:
Multiple production services failing simultaneously. Symptoms:
- /tickets endpoint timing out at 60s
- Inbox UI shows infinite spinner
- Webhook outbound: 0 deliveries in past 30 min
- Email-in: not appearing in inbox

Looks like a database / queue layer issue. Status page still claims green which is a separate problem.

Javier Morales, Lead SRE

subject: Sev2 escalating to Sev1 — search returning wrong tickets
body:
Search results are returning tickets from other customers' workspaces. Confirmed by multiple users on my team independently — they each see results for customers they don't know.

This is a multi-tenant data leak issue, same severity as a security incident.

Disable search until you can confirm it's safe. We're disabling it on our side too.

Grace Ndlovu
VP Product

subject: Critical: notifications going to wrong people
body:
We just got a notification email about a ticket — sent to me, but the content references a customer who is NOT in my workspace. The notification system is mis-addressing emails.

More worryingly: who is getting OUR notifications? Probably some other unrelated customer.

This is a privacy issue. Please disable the notification system org-wide until fixed.

Viktor Horvat

subject: Platform-wide degradation — need on-call update
body:
Production outage in progress. Symptoms:
- All API endpoints returning 502/503
- Customer-facing chat widget broken on our site
- Inbox view empty (data fetch failing)
- Webhook queue stuck

We've had to put a banner on our site saying 'support tools temporarily degraded.' Customer trust impact mounting.

Need update from your on-call within 15 minutes.

Sneha Kulkarni, Director of Engineering

subject: API permissions issue — getting 403s on documented endpoints
body:
Our service account is getting 403 Forbidden on /v2/admin/users endpoint. Per your docs, this endpoint is accessible to admin tokens. Our token has admin scope (verified in dashboard).

Did scopes change recently? Migration we missed?

This is breaking our nightly user-sync job.

Ricardo Silva
Integration Engineer

subject: Memory leak in your widget — crashing customer browsers
body:
Your chat widget v3.4.1 has a memory leak. Customer browsers are crashing after ~45 minutes of having the widget loaded.

Reproduced in Chrome DevTools — JS heap grows ~3MB/min, no GC. Heap snapshot shows your widget's event listeners accumulating.

We've pulled the widget from our site for now. Need a hotfix.

Zhang Min
Frontend Lead

subject: P0: timezones broken on a major customer's data
body:
Our timestamps from your platform are off by exactly 5h 30m for one specific customer. All other customers normal. Customer is in India (UTC+5:30).

Looks like a TZ handling bug — you're treating their local time as UTC. Their reports are showing yesterday's data as today's.

Needs a hotfix. This is also probably affecting other India-based customers we don't know about.

Aditya Joshi, Tech Lead

subject: Customer demo in 1 hour — workspace inaccessible
body:
I have a $1.2M Fortune 500 demo at 16:14 UTC. My demo workspace is throwing 'workspace temporarily disabled' on every page load.

Why is it disabled? I have not done anything to trigger this. Demo is in less than 60 minutes.

If this demo doesn't happen, my CEO will personally call your CEO. Please respond.

Helena Berg, VP Sales

subject: API quota exhausted unexpectedly
body:
We hit our monthly API quota at 23:47 UTC — three days before the cycle ends. Our usage hasn't changed; same volume as last 4 months.

Looks like your usage metering has miscounted somewhere. Can you check whether bot/retry traffic is being counted against our quota?

We need quota raised temporarily to keep production running.

Emeka Obi
Platform Engineer

subject: All push notifications stopped at 06:00 UTC
body:
Our team relies on push notifications from your mobile app to know when high-priority tickets come in. At 06:00 UTC today, push notifications stopped for everyone. No exceptions.

In-app notifications still work. Email notifications still work. Just push is dead.

Firebase/APNS issue on your side?

Laura Garcia

subject: 5+ hours on a P0 — escalating to leadership
body:
I opened ticket #21887 at 17:00 UTC yesterday marked P0. Database write failures — symptom is that ticket state changes (close, assign, tag) silently fail. UI says success, DB doesn't update.

It's now 22:30 UTC. I have had zero response from your team. P0 SLA is 1 hour.

I've copied my CTO and yours (Niraj). If this isn't fixed and explained by EOD I'm invoking the early-termination clause in our contract.

Rohan Malhotra, VP Platform Engineering

subject: Replay attack vulnerability — webhooks not idempotent
body:
Investigating an issue and discovered: your webhook deliveries don't include a unique idempotency key in the headers. Re-replays of the same payload (intentional or not) are indistinguishable from new events.

We've been double-processing some events because of this. Need an `Idempotency-Key` or similar header on webhook deliveries.

This is borderline security issue — replay-vulnerable webhook stream.

Beatriz Lima, Security Engineer

subject: CRITICAL: ticket data exposed to anonymous URL
body:
I just discovered that ticket detail URLs (e.g., yourapp.com/t/abc123) are accessible WITHOUT authentication. I copied a URL from my browser, opened an incognito window, pasted it — and got the full ticket detail.

This appears to be a recent regression. Authentication has been bypassed somewhere.

FIX IMMEDIATELY. This is data exposure at scale.

Yusuf Ibrahim
Application Security Lead

subject: Severe: customer onboarding broken end-to-end
body:
New signups can't get past the welcome screen. We test this every day and today (since the morning deploy on your side) it's completely broken. Console shows:

```
Fetch error: workspace creation failed (HTTP 500)
```

We have 30+ pending signups stuck. Estimated revenue impact: $4K/hour and growing.

Clara Weber
Growth Engineering

subject: URGENT — analytics showing impossible values
body:
Our analytics dashboard is showing -3,400 active tickets. NEGATIVE. This is mathematically impossible.

More concerning: this number is being pushed to our customer-facing 'platform health' dashboard. Customers see negative numbers and panic.

Disable the metric or fix the bug. Both work for me. Need it gone in the next hour.

Lukas Schneider
Site Reliability Engineer

subject: P0: Service worker pushing malformed updates to all users
body:
Your service worker pushed an update at 01:30 UTC that is causing every page in our embedded UI to white-screen. Every customer with our integration is affected.

Looks like a malformed JS bundle was deployed. We've forced cache-bust on our side but the service worker is serving the broken version.

ROLLBACK NOW. We are unable to mitigate from our side.

Mariana Costa, Frontend Architect
